title: LaNorme configuration
description: The [tool.lanorme] table in pyproject.toml, or top-level keys in a standalone lanorme.toml.

select.description: Run only these rule codes or categories. A category (`SEC`) covers every code in it; `ALL` selects everything.

ignore.description: Skip these rule codes or categories everywhere.

exclude.description: File-path globs to skip entirely; matched files are never walked.

per-file-ignores.description: Suppress specific rule codes or categories for files matching a glob.

promote.description: Advisory warnings whose codes (or `ALL`) become build-failing errors. Runs after every suppression, so an ignored or noqa'd warning is never promoted.

extends.description: Adopt one or more profiles -- a bundled name (`strict`, `hexagonal`, `clean`, `layered`) or a path to a local `.toml`. Profiles merge left to right, then your own keys merge on top, so local always wins.

baseline.description: Path to a baseline file. Findings recorded by `lanorme baseline write` are suppressed, so only new findings report. See the adoption tutorial.

source_root.description: The top-level package directory when ports, adapters and layers live under a nested package; the architecture checks interpret their paths relative to it.

plugins.description: Extra check modules to import so they self-register, beyond the built-ins and entry-point plugins.

attribute_access.description: Settings for the attribute_access check (see docs/RULES.md).

comments.description: Settings for the comments check (see docs/RULES.md).

docs.description: Settings for the docs check (see docs/RULES.md).

domain_terms.description: Settings for the domain_terms check (see docs/RULES.md).

duplication.description: Settings for the duplication check (see docs/RULES.md).

file_limits.description: Settings for the file_limits check (see docs/RULES.md).

forbidden_paths.description: Settings for the forbidden_paths check (see docs/RULES.md).

layer_deps.description: Settings for the layer_deps check (see docs/RULES.md).

meta.description: Settings for the meta check (see docs/RULES.md).

named_args.description: Settings for the named_args check (see docs/RULES.md).

naming_consistency.description: Settings for the naming_consistency check (see docs/RULES.md).

pattern_divergence.description: Settings for the pattern_divergence check (see docs/RULES.md).

port_coverage.description: Settings for the port_coverage check (see docs/RULES.md).

prose.description: Settings for the prose check (see docs/RULES.md).

restating.description: Settings for the restating check (see docs/RULES.md).

secrets.description: Settings for the secrets check (see docs/RULES.md).

security_calls.description: Settings for the security_calls check (see docs/RULES.md).

security_patterns.description: Settings for the security_patterns check (see docs/RULES.md).

similarity.description: Settings for the similarity check (see docs/RULES.md).

skills.description: Settings for the skills check (see docs/RULES.md).

stale_paths.description: Settings for the stale_paths check (see docs/RULES.md).

stray_artifacts.description: Settings for the stray_artifacts check (see docs/RULES.md).

strong_types.description: Settings for the strong_types check (see docs/RULES.md).

test_coverage.description: Settings for the test_coverage check (see docs/RULES.md).

test_style.description: Settings for the test_style check (see docs/RULES.md).
